public_safety.public_export_rule: Dashboard only summarizes public-safe artifacts and planning signals.

changed_work_lines.change_summary: Weekly refresh moved from baseline map to decision dashboard.
Dashboard now separates partner-ready work, Codex-ready work, and automation candidates.
Dashboard has explicit blocked/private-only list and public safety checks.

kevin_focus: Review private boundaries before real workforce data
Judge which partner role to test next
partner_ready: Source collection for public-safe research cards
First-draft summaries from approved public materials
Checklist conversion for low-risk work lines
codex_ready: Generate public-safe SVG and HTML sections

blocked_or_private_only.reason: Requires private repo boundary review and Kevin approval.
Public repo allows only fictional or de-identified examples.
External contact requires explicit approval in that run.
noindex is not privacy and de-identification must be reviewed.

next_week_candidates.action: Build a social-worker tools line card
Build a citizen finance-life tools roadmap card
Turn dashboard CSV into a private Notion or Google Sheets workboard
